orchestrator.description: Root Supervisor and Entry Point for large project workflows.
orchestrator.prompt: 1. ROOT ANCHORING: Always anchor yourself in the conversation root. 2. BOOT SEQUENCE: Your very first action MUST be to read `.opencode/instructions/INSTRUCTIONS.md` and then traverse all files in `plans/`. {file:agents/orchestrator.md}

reducer.description: Output synthesis specialist for merging parallel task results.

build.description: Primary coding agent for development work

planner.description: Pure task decomposition specialist. Analyzes complex requirements and breaks them into atomic, executable steps for domain specialists. NEVER writes code.

architect.description: Software architecture specialist for system design, scalability, and technical decision-making.
architect.prompt: 1. ROOT ANCHORING: Immediately verify your root directory. 2. BOOT SEQUENCE: Your very first action MUST be to read `.opencode/instructions/INSTRUCTIONS.md` and then traverse all files in `plans/` (especially scope hubs, task files, and `INSTRUCTIONS.md`). You are not permitted to provide architectural guidance until this context is synchronized. {file:agents/architect.md}

code-reviewer.description: Expert code review specialist. Reviews code for quality, security, and maintainability. Use immediately after writing or modifying code.

security-reviewer.description: Security vulnerability detection and remediation specialist. Use after writing code that handles user input, authentication, API endpoints, or sensitive data.

tdd-guide.description: Test-Driven Development specialist enforcing write-tests-first methodology. Use when writing new features, fixing bugs, or refactoring code. Ensures 80%+ test coverage.

build-error-resolver.description: Build and TypeScript error resolution specialist. Use when build fails or type errors occur. Fixes build/type errors only with minimal diffs.

e2e-runner.description: End-to-end testing specialist using Playwright. Generates, maintains, and runs E2E tests for critical user flows.

doc-updater.description: Documentation and codemap specialist. Use for updating codemaps and documentation.

refactor-cleaner.description: Dead code cleanup and consolidation specialist. Use for removing unused code, duplicates, and refactoring.

database-reviewer.description: PostgreSQL database specialist for query optimization, schema design, security, and performance. Incorporates Supabase best practices.

critic.description: Enterprise adversarial reviewer. Stress-tests proposals, plans, code, and architecture for edge cases, security flaws, architectural debt, and hidden risks.

researcher.description: General-purpose research specialist with broad knowledge spanning technical and non-technical domains.

fact-checker.description: Unbiased verification specialist who looks for hallucinations, inaccuracies, and outdated information.

frontend-engineer.description: Frontend implementation specialist. Writes UI components, layouts, pages, and ensures design system compliance.

database-engineer.description: Database specialist for schema design, query optimization, migrations, and data modeling.

devops-engineer.description: DevOps and infrastructure specialist. Manages CI/CD pipelines, Docker containers, and deployment configurations.

integration-engineer.description: Third-party integration specialist. Implements external API connections, webhooks, and service connectors.

ml-engineer.description: Machine learning engineer for model integration, embeddings, inference pipelines, and AI-powered features.

performance-reviewer.description: Performance specialist for identifying bottlenecks, memory issues, latency problems, and optimization opportunities.

accessibility-reviewer.description: WCAG compliance specialist for ensuring digital accessibility.

qa-engineer.description: Quality assurance specialist for test coverage, edge case identification, and regression detection.

synthesis-writer.description: Synthesis writer for bootstrap roadmap generation. Writes planning artifacts in parallel during the Synthesis phase.

commit-all.description: Detect all changes, commit each separately, then push all

inject.description: Incrementally inject new requirements into the existing project roadmap

bootstrap.description: Master starter sequence: Generate context files through an orchestration assembly line

plan.description: Create a detailed implementation plan for complex features

tdd.description: Enforce TDD workflow with 80%+ test coverage

code-review.description: Review code for quality, security, and maintainability

refactor-clean.description: Remove dead code and consolidate duplicates

execute.description: Execute an approved plan or ad-hoc task with full agent-driven implementation, audit, and delivery

routine.description: Execute a roadmap phase with atomic task checkpointing — implement, audit, commit per task

sitrep.description: Fast situational report of the current workspace state

aside.description: Answer a quick side question without interrupting the current task

context-budget.description: Analyze context window usage and optimization opportunities

resume-session.description: Load the most recent session file and resume with full context

save-session.description: Save current session state to a dated resumable file

sessions.description: Manage OpenCode session history, aliases, and session metadata

harness-health.description: Validate OpenCode CheatScale harness wiring and cleanup state

gotcha.description: Log, list, and check recurring harness mistakes using local-only gotcha state

skill-builder.description: Create and validate OpenCode-compatible skills with collision checks

harness-optimize.description: Run a manual, gated meta-harness diagnosis using local gotchas and optional traces

loop-plan.description: Draft a bounded Loop Engineering contract before running loop-like work

loop-report.description: Produce a read-only Loop Engineering heartbeat report over local harness state

push.description: Run automated DevOps overhead and contribution drip-feeder

commit.description: Stage the current work for the strategic contribution drip-feeder

debate.description: Trigger a debate between specialized agents for a better, unified solution

research.description: Run an adversarial research loop for high-confidence answers to any question

validate-roadmap.description: Verify, validate, review, and scope the current roadmap implementation

jira-push.description: Create JIRA Epic > Task > Subtask hierarchy from bootstrap roadmap

jira-delete.description: Delete JIRA epic, tasks, and subtasks from a roadmap feature

backdate.description: Populate empty contribution days in a GitHub profile graph with backdated commits

redate.description: Rewrite timestamps of commits already in git history, spreading them across a target date or range
